items.text:
FIRST CLASS FREE! - Thursday 14/05 7-8pm

Mondays 6.30pm - 7.30pm (First class £3)

Both classes are BRAND NEW ROUTINES so it’s a great time to jump and start fresh! 🙌

sharedPost.text:
Smashed it last night in ADULT BEGINNERS! Quick session, all learned in an hour, drilling out the moves and working on our speed of movement in a faster, more commercial routine. Is it perfection? No! But for an hours hard graft they ROCKED IT! 🥰🙌 And the vibe was insane! 👌

Why not come and join us next time? This class is for anybody, even if you haven’t danced before!! With my guidance you’ll be amazed what you can do! (Details in the comments.) 

#liverpooldance #beginnersdance #liverpoolfitness #Liverpool #starttheweek

sharedPost.text:
Wow💥😮 I’m truly amazed by the strength and grace of Shen Yun’s dancers — their legs and arms are pure power in motion!💪🔥 Their control, flexibility, and grace are simply next level.
Here we go! 🌟 ⚡️Don't miss the magical and captivating experience of a live performance.
🎟️ Choose your best seat here and make your special day unforgettable:👉 https://1kb.link/qQZIil

items.text:
Hello Open Casting Calls! We are casting for the Netflix show Age of Attraction. Season 1 is airing now. I am posting this flyer and the application for you to apply today! We are looking for non-actor men aged 22-29 and 40-59. To Apply: 
[https://us.castitreach.com/ag/realcasting/ageofattraction/welcome.html](https://us.castitreach.com/ag/realcasting/ageofattraction/welcome.html?fbclid=IwZXh0bgNhZW0CMTAAYnJpZBExRVd2VnVtVmxYSUwxc0FTTnNydGMGYXBwX2lkEDIyMjAzOTE3ODgyMDA4OTIAAR5T56TNiGu9UJvXS1vV_XDw9TrDCGykb0tSld1mlNP8ch4frLAjgMUd3jMgSw_aem_D-Pu_9dhnpGkqb6Bo4X3Ng) Select “Leigh” as your casting contact!

DM [https://www.facebook.com/profile.php?id=61577220914905](https://www.facebook.com/profile.php?id=61577220914905) when done with App. Thanks!

attachments.ocrText: May be an image of text that says 'Are you looking for love? AGE OF ATTRACTION NOW CASTING SINGLE MEN NETFLIX For more information and to apply: AgeofAttractionCasting.com'

Opskrift i kommentarerne.

items.text:
CASTING CALL — PAID EDITORIAL PORTRAIT SHOOT

Los Angeles / Hollywood | May 16–19 (exact date TBD) | 4–6 Hours | $150

Seeking: Male talent, 40s–60s

This is a cinematic portrait shoot, not a commercial job. The images are being made as authored editorial work — the kind of photograph that lives on a wall or in a book, not an ad. You will receive full high-resolution images for your own portfolio, acting reel, or personal use.

We are looking for someone who can inhabit a character, not just stand in front of a camera. Presence matters more than looks. The right person has a face that carries history — heavy, weathered, specific. Think less model, more character actor. Early Sopranos energy. The kind of man who looks like he’s been somewhere and isn’t sure where he’s going next.

The shoot takes place at a Hollywood motel. The work is psychological and still — influenced by photographer Philip-Lorca diCorcia. Not fashion. Not commercial. Something quieter and more interior.

The primary setup: a man on the edge of a bed, business suit on, briefcase in hand or at his feet, staring into the corner of the room. That’s the image. Simple, loaded, cinematic. We’ll work through 2–3 variations within the same emotional world.

This role requires stillness and the ability to hold an internal emotional state without performing it. If you’ve ever been told your face does the work — this is that job.

Ideal if you own a dark business suit. Well-worn is better than sharp. Wardrobe can be supplied if needed — just include your measurements when you submit.

Rate: $150 for the session

Full image credit on all published work

High-res selects provided for your portfolio

To submit: send a recent photo (doesn’t need to be professional, just natural) and a brief note about yourself to info@leonardabraham.com

sharedPost.text:
BIG BREAK IS BACK!

The much-loved BBC gameshow returns with Paddy McGuinness and Stephen Hendry!

We’re looking for quick-thinking contestants with a head full of knowledge and the nerve to take their shot.

Answer general knowledge questions, stay on the table and you could rack up a winning streak of cash prizes.

No snooker skills needed — just a sharp mind

Apply now:
https://shortaudition.net/BBC-Gameshow

Applicants must be 18+ years of age and have the right to live and work in the UK
Applications open until 10th June 2026*

Any personal information which you provide to us shall be used and processed in accordance with our privacy policy which is available on:
https://fremantle.co.uk/privacy-notice-applicant.pdf

or by emailing:
privacy.officer@fremantle.com

*or any other dates as the Producer elects. Terms and conditions apply.

Naked West
A Fremantle Label

BBC

Scan our QR Code to apply!

****London - Costume Characters****

We are working on a really exciting family event on the 30th May 9.30am - 5.00pm.

We are looking for experienced and energetic performers for a new costume character with the following specifications - to fit the costume:

Height: 172cm - 178cm

Shoe size - no bigger than a UK 8

Waist: 70cm or less

Bust: 85cm or less

Pay £18.49 an hour + £10 travel expenses.

Its imperative you are the above sizings so that you fit in the costume. If available and interested please email staffing@thestaffroomuk.com

We look forward to hearing from you

items.text:
🎬 POSZUKIWANI STATYŚCI: AMERYKAŃSKA RODZINA (ZAKWATEROWANI W JEDNYM AUCIE! 🚗)
Do studenckiego projektu krótkometrażowego poszukujemy osób, które wcielą się w rolę amerykańskiej rodziny.

Szukamy najlepiej "w pakiecie"! Bardzo zależy nam na zgłoszeniach grupowych (np. prawdziwe rodziny, pary, grupy znajomych), które mogą przyjechać na plan wspólnym transportem. Chcemy ograniczyć liczbę samochodów na planie i zadbać o ekologię naszej produkcji! 

TERMINY I LOKACJE:

📍 15.05 (ok. 1h w ciągu dnia) – Brwinów

📍 16.05 (pełny dzień) – Brwinów

📍 17.05 (pełny dzień) – Michałów k. Warszawy

Dojazd we własnym zakresie (szukamy ekip zmotoryzowanych).

KOGO SZUKAMY?

Osób w różnym wieku (rodzice, dzieci, dziadkowie) o typie urody pasującym do amerykańskich przedmieść (patrz: zdjęcia referencyjne).

Rola bez kwestii mówionych.

W ZAMIAN OFERUJEMY:

✨ Super atmosferę i spotkanie z uznaną obsadą.

✨ Materiały do portfolio.

(Projekt studencki – bez wynagrodzenia finansowego).

JAK SIĘ ZGŁOSIĆ?

Jeśli masz ekipę/rodzinę, z którą możesz przyjechać, wyślij wspólne zgłoszenie na adres:

📧 production@to-dofilms.com

W tytule: Statuści – Amerykańska Rodzina [+ liczba osób]

W treści: Imiona, wiek, numery kontaktowe oraz wspólne zdjęcie (lub zdjęcia każdego z członków ekipy).

Do zobaczenia na planie! 🎥🇺🇸

items.text:
CASTING 📸 do reklamy słodyczy szukamy: kobiet i mężczyzn w wieku 18-40 lat. Łącznie mamy 7 ról głównych (role z tekstem). Fajny, komediowy scenariusz 😉 

Mile widziane wszelkie typy urody, sylwetki oraz różne fryzury, RÓŻNE KOLORY włosów ,  zarosty, wąsy… itp. 

💵 Wynagrodzenie 5000 zł. 
🎥 Zdjęcia: 26.05.2026, w Warszawie; zapewniamy zwrot kosztów podróży;  

‼️ZGŁOSZENIE: 

📧 wyślij w mailu na FILM@FILMTROJMIASTO.PL - z tytułem ,,REKLAMA SŁODYCZE” - podaj: 

🔸 imię nazwisko, wiek, miasto zamieszkania 
🔹 numer telefonu 
🔸 krótko opisz swoje doświadczenie reklamowe, filmowe, aktorskie, teatralne itp.
🔹 w załączniku jedno aktualne zdjęcie całej sylwetki z widoczną twarzą i aktualną fryzurą

‼️ Zgłoszenia przyjmujemy do wtorku, 5 maja. 

Skontaktujemy się z wybranymi osobami mailowo - wyślemy szczegóły oraz informacje co należy wysłać w ramach selftape (będzie to między innymi: video wizytówka + scenka).

📧 wyślij w mailu na FILM@FILMTROJMIASTO.PL - z tytułem ,,REKLAMA SŁODYCZE” - podaj: 

🔸 imię nazwisko, wiek, miasto zamieszkania 
🔹 numer telefonu 
🔸 krótko opisz swoje doświadczenie reklamowe, filmowe, aktorskie, teatralne itp.
🔹 w załączniku jedno aktualne zdjęcie całej sylwetki z widoczną twarzą i aktualną fryzurą

‼️ Zgłoszenia przyjmujemy do wtorku, 5 maja. 

Skontaktujemy się z wybranymi osobami mailowo - wyślemy szczegóły oraz informacje co należy wysłać w ramach selftape (będzie to między innymi: video wizytówka + scenka).
items.title: CASTING 📸 do reklamy słodyczy szukamy: kobiet i mężczyzn w wieku 18-40 lat. Łącznie mamy 7 ról głównych (role z tekstem). Fajny, komediowy scenariusz 😉

items.text:
Do najnowszego odcinka GLINIARZY realizowanego w Warszawie (oraz bliskich okolicach) szukam:

- Damian Piechoski (29) – pracownik gospodarstwa Henryka, okradł go po śmierci. Nie wyróżnia się z wyglądu, średnia budowa ciała. AKTOR PO SZKOLE LUB KURSACH
DATA: 26.05
STAWKA: 700 zł netto

- Sąsiadka (61) – Janina Krawiec, sąsiadka Henryka, znalazła jego ciało. Lubiła Henryka, znała jego konflikt z bratankiem. Spostrzegawcza, szczera, pomocna.  
DATA: 26.05
STAWKA: 400 zł netto

- Zbigniew Gosek (37) – bratanek Henryka, drobny oszust, kieszonkowiec. Nerwowy, chaotyczny. Drobnej postury. Lekko zaniedbany i zapuszczony. Był skonfliktowany z Henrykiem. Pracuje na taksówce. Umie biegać. 
AKTOR PO SZKOLE LUB KURSACH
DATA: 26.05 i 27.05
STAWKA: 1400 zł netto za 2 dni

- Mirek – Mirosław Bednarz (56) – rolnik, dalszy sąsiad Henryka, sprawca nieumyślnego zabójstwa. Krzepki, mocno zbudowany. Brutalny wobec żony, przemocowy. 
DATA: 27.05
STAWKA: 500 zł netto

- Mariola Bednarz (55) – żona Mirka, ofiara przemocy domowej. Drobna wiejska kobieta, ubiera się skromnie. Żyje w strachu przed mężem. Poszła z mężem do Henryka, była przy kłótni i śmierci. Z wyrzutów sumienia próbowała skontaktować się z policją, za co została pobita przez męża. 
DATA: 27.05
STAWKA: 600 zł netto

- Sławek Szymkowiak (26) – znajomy Zbyszka, dresik, drobny złodziej.
DATA: 27.05
STAWKA: 400 zł netto

Zgłoszenia przyjmujemy TYLKO MAILOWO.

Zainteresowane osoby proszę o zgłoszenia na adres: outsetola@op.pl
W tytule e-maila proszę o wpisanie nazwy postaci.
W treści:
- Wiek, wzrost, waga
- Numer telefonu
- Informacje o dotychczasowym doświadczeniu przed kamerą
- Linki do swoich materiałów video: wizytówka/demo/scenki ze swoim udziałem (najlepiej w formie linka na youtube)
- Aktualne zdjęcie
- Informacja czy grali Państwo w przeszłości w Gliniarzach

Nie zwracamy kosztów dojazdu i noclegu.

items.text:
🎬 POSZUKIWANI STATYŚCI: AMERYKAŃSKA RODZINA (ZAKWATEROWANI W JEDNYM AUCIE! 🚗)
Do studenckiego projektu krótkometrażowego poszukujemy osób, które wcielą się w rolę amerykańskiej rodziny.

Szukamy najlepiej "w pakiecie"! Bardzo zależy nam na zgłoszeniach grupowych (np. prawdziwe rodziny, pary, grupy znajomych), które mogą przyjechać na plan wspólnym transportem. Chcemy ograniczyć liczbę samochodów na planie i zadbać o ekologię naszej produkcji! 

TERMINY I LOKACJE:

📍 15.05 (ok. 1h w ciągu dnia) – Brwinów

📍 16.05 (pełny dzień) – Brwinów

📍 17.05 (pełny dzień) – Michałów k. Warszawy

Dojazd we własnym zakresie (szukamy ekip zmotoryzowanych).

KOGO SZUKAMY?

Osób w różnym wieku (rodzice, dzieci, dziadkowie) o typie urody pasującym do amerykańskich przedmieść (patrz: zdjęcia referencyjne).

Rola bez kwestii mówionych.

W ZAMIAN OFERUJEMY:

✨ Super atmosferę i spotkanie z uznaną obsadą.

✨ Materiały do portfolio.

(Projekt studencki – bez wynagrodzenia finansowego).

JAK SIĘ ZGŁOSIĆ?

Jeśli masz ekipę/rodzinę, z którą możesz przyjechać, wyślij wspólne zgłoszenie na adres:

📧 production@to-dofilms.com

W tytule: Statuści – Amerykańska Rodzina [+ liczba osób]

W treści: Imiona, wiek, numery kontaktowe oraz wspólne zdjęcie (lub zdjęcia każdego z członków ekipy).

Do zobaczenia na planie! 🎥🇺🇸

🎬 OGŁOSZENIE – STATYŚCI DO NOWEGO SERIALU 🎬

Do nowego współczesnego serialu poszukujemy statystów do sceny w Tawernie

📅 Terminy zdjęć: 11 i 12 maja  
🕐 Zbiórki: około godziny 13:00  
🌗 Zdjęcia: dzienno-nocne  
📍 Lokalizacja: Rynia nad Zegrzem

💰 Stawka:  
– 340 zł za dwa dni zdjęciowe (płatne drugiego dnia)  
– 400 zł łącznie dla osób, które przyjadą samochodem i zabiorą minimum 3 osoby (płatne drugiego dnia)

🚗 Mile widziane osoby zmotoryzowane

📩 Zgłoszenia prosimy wysyłać na maila:  
impresariat.kamedstudio@gmail.com 
Temat wiadomości: TAWERNA

Jeśli możesz być dostępny/a tylko jednego dnia, koniecznie zaznacz to w zgłoszeniu.  
(Pierwszeństwo mają osoby dyspozycyjne przez oba dni.)

📝 W zgłoszeniu prosimy zawrzeć:
– imię i nazwisko  
– numer telefonu  
– aktualne zdjęcie (twarz + sylwetka)

Zapraszamy do współpracy! 🎥

Casting call 
We are  auditioning for a profit share panto. 
If you are interested please contact md here or email individualityproductions@hotmail.com 
Characters
Red - principal girl good comedy timing and strong singing voice
Wolf- the villain. Great projection and character
Woody- principal boy. Confident slightly naive. 
Fairy godmother- smiley character and personality also sings.
Hansel and gretel- dame and your typical silly billy
3 pugs- great comedy characters.  Full of fun. 
Very traditional pantomime if interested please get in touch auditioning next couple of weeks.

items.text:
Hello everyone,

We're a team of 18 industry professionals, from actors, editors, camera ops, DOPs, composers, directors, writers, independent filmmakers, post sound, gaffers, producers and production assistants who have all come together to enter the Manchester 48hr film project on the 16th-17th of this month. 

We’re looking for a sound recordist/sound mixer with their own kit to join our team for the challenge. 

We’ve already got a strong crew across all other departments, and have an experienced boom operator but unfortunately he doesn't have his own kit. With sound being one of the most important parts of any film, we’re really hoping to bring someone passionate and skilled on board.
As part of the festival rules, this is a purely collaborative passion project, no payment is allowed for cast or crew — it’s all about creativity, teamwork, and making the best film possible within 48 hours. This is something as creatives we are all passionate about, so have come together as one big team to have a fun weekend getting truly creative.

It’s a fantastic opportunity to work with a dedicated team, create something under pressure, and be part of an internationally recognised competition. If we win locally, the film goes on to compete internationally, with finalists having the chance to screen at the Cannes Film Festival.
Sound recordist would only be required on the 16th as that is shoot day. 

The film will then be screened at the Vue cinema in Manchester on the 30th may as part of the festival.

If you’re interested, or know someone who might be a good fit, please get in touch.
Thanks,
Chris

items.text:
**Casting Roles for Micro Comedy - Denver DMV**

**PROJECT DESCRIPTION: **

Short-form workplace sitcom that takes place in a “government agency”.  The project will be filmed in a similar style to The Office, Parks & Rec.

**LOGLINE:**

Each day serendipity brings people from all walks of life together at the Denver DMV. A place where those behind the counter are just as annoyed and bewildered as those crammed into plastic chairs awaiting their number to be called.

**FILMING DATE:** TBD

We will be filming 2 days over a weekend either July 18-19 OR Aug. 1-2 in central Denver

**RATE: ** $200/day + 20% agency (10hr)

**USAGE:**  Web, YouTube, Social

**PRODUCTION COMPANY:**  Neato Pictures

**ROLES: ** 

**Janet (F, 60s)**

A local has-been actress now working at the DMV for the last 10 years.  Long after local fame as the ‘84 - ‘86 face of a local dealership, Janet still believes her acting break is just around the corner. Personally driven but not a team player, Janet only works to collect a check.   She is trying to hold onto her youth but her flamboyance often barely covers her insecurities.  

**Carl (M, 50s)**

A no-frills, serious, deliberate man who shows up on time and does everything with purpose. He’s a “lifer” at the DMV having been there over 16 years and doesn’t enjoy change. With a military background, Carl is a man of strict order, tradition, and pride in his work. Rumor has it, Carl was honorably discharged over a chronic case of lock-jaw due to stress. 

**SUBMISSIONS:**  By Monday 5/18

If you have great comedic timing and feel like you might be our Janet or Carl, we'd love to hear from you. 

Please email** Brandy@neatopictures.com** for audition requirements and script.  Thanks for your interest!

items.text:
**🎬 CASTING CALL — COMEDY CLUB AUDIENCE EXTRAS 🎤**
**for the short film: *****KEPT GOING***
**Written & Directed by **Jordan Jackson

**Ever wanted to be part of a comedy show that goes HORRIBLY wrong?**

**We’re looking for audience extras to fill out a comedy club scene for our upcoming short film *****Kept Going***** — a dark comedy/survival short made as part of a 13-film challenge series.**

**📅 FILMING DATE: MAY 17TH, 2026**

**You’ll be:**

·         **reacting to stand-up comedy**

·         **witnessing a comedian absolutely destroy his own career in real time**

·         **laughing, gasping, judging, cringing, and helping create the chaotic energy of the film**

** **

**AND:**

**1.   You WILL be seen on camera**

**2.   Includes IMDb Credit**

**3.   Great chance to network & be part of a fun indie set experience**

**━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━**

**🎭 ROLE:**
**Comedy Club Audience Members**
**(all looks/types welcome)**

**━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━**

**🎬 ABOUT THE FILM**

***Kept Going***** follows Nate, a cocky stand-up comedian who refuses to stop digging himself deeper after making jokes at the expense of the wrong person. What starts as an awkward comedy set spirals into a bizarre survival nightmare deep in the woods involving kidnappers, fake ancestry, family secrets… and a wooden moose.**

**Tone-wise imagine:**

**1.   awkward stand-up comedy**

**2.   wilderness survival chaos**

**3.   psychological humiliation**

**4.   the dumbest possible decisions made with complete confidence**

**━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━**

**📍 Filming Location:**
**Colorado Springs, Colorado**

**🕒 Shoot Duration:**
**2 Hours & 30 Minutes**
**(3:30 PM – 6:00 PM)**

**Compensation:**
**Non-paid**
**IMDb Credit + footage + guaranteed visibility on screen**

**━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━**

**📩 TO JOIN:**
**Message me directly or email:**
**[jjacks24@uccs.edu](mailto:jjacks24@uccs.edu)**

**Include:**
**• Name**
**• Age**
**• Recent photo/selfie**
**• Availability**

**Come laugh at a man ruining his life in real time.**

items.text:
Hi, I'm Dani, a film photographer and part of Flare, an analog photography collective for women and dissidences with presence in Chile, France and Canada. 

We run open calls, photography gatherings and collaborative editorials where different artistic practices intersect — and we're hoping to bring it all together in a photobook in the future. We're now looking to connect with people in Berlin and build something here too — so if you're into analog photography, this is your invitation 💛

This Sunday May 10th we're opening a Mother's Day call: desired motherhood, not-so-desired, imposed, dissident. All perspectives welcome — emotional, conceptual, abstract, entirely your own. Analog format only.

Form closes Sunday May 10th:
🕛 12:00 Santiago & Valdivia, Chile
🕛 12:00 Toronto, Canada 
🕕 19:00 Toulouse, France 
🕕 19:00 Berlin, Germany 

📋 English form: https://forms.gle/j2DnPfsZRfwqm8je6
📋 Español: https://forms.gle/CELnomRbLHqZ2EB26
📋 Français: https://forms.gle/4dnp2pZSfec7LDTh7 

✶

Photography: https://www.instagram.com/jopipemi

✶

https://www.instagram.com/flare.analogo/

items.text:
Adult Panto Jack OFF The Beanstalk  is back in the West End for 2026 thew show will   open at Scala London in the heart of London’s West End!

 

We are now casting for the following roles only

 

Jack Trott

We are looking for an actor who can play our hero  funny humble  a strong singer musical theatre/pop sound as well as a good mover with dashing looks and a great physique.

Must be comfortable  gong off script at  and working an  audience

 

 

Dame Trott - Male

We are looking for experienced Dames/character actors who are larger than life with bags of personality as well as versatility and natural comedy must be great at working an audience and have the gift of the gab

Must be comfortable  going off script  and working an  audience

 

Billy Trott  -Male

We are   looking for a  very   strong  comic to play Jacks  idle Brother

Must be comfortable  going off script and  and working an  audience .

 

 

The Dates

Auditions in May in central London

Rehearsals-Monday 30th November -11th December

Playing dates 14th December -3rd  January 2027

We are offering an attractive buy-out fee to include rehearsals and shows .

Please email details/reels  to [info@theentertainmentproviders.co.uk](mailto:info@theentertainmentproviders.co.uk)

Experienced, confident, mature look with a strong screen presence — open to acting, modelling, presenter work, commercials, character roles, lifestyle campaigns, and collaboration opportunities.

Based in Yorkshire and available for projects across the UK.

Always interested in connecting with:
• Casting directors
• Photographers
• Creative agencies
• Film makers
• Other actors and models

Feel free to connect, share, or message regarding suitable opportunities.

items.text:
## **Free acting taster class!**

**VISIT ACTORSCAFE.CO.UK AND CLICK THE FREE TASTER CLASS TAB.**
## **SIGN UP TO OUR SPotlight Listed COURSES TODAY, SPACES ARE FILLING UP QUICKLY!**

**For all ages 18-80! and all acting abilities from novice to professional. Students are achieving their Spotlight accreditation, landing acting agents, and are developing strong confidence and realism in their craft.**

**Students have previously booked for TV Roles (BBC / ITV / Channel 4) commercials, Independent Feature Films, Short Films, voice dubbing (Netflix / Sky) and have landed fringe theatre productions.**

*CAMILLA ARTHUR CASTING "A massive 'hats off' to you and your team - and thank you. I am blown away with your teaching and your approach and just your generosity of spirit. I loved it."*

Venue: Watford, Finsbury Park, Chelmsford

Dates: May 2026

See actorscafe.co.uk/free-taster-class

**Professional Acting Tuition For All. Our Courses Teach Beginners to Advanced / Spotlight Actors.**

*ALEX SCANLAN. CAM ACTOR'S AGENCY - "Having visited the Actor's Cafe on three separate occasions now, I can really see the great work it produces."*

*CARL PROCTOR. CASTING DIRECTOR -"Everyone seemed to get a lot out of it. A nice group who seem to benefit hugely from you courses."*

*PAUL GIDDINGS. BBC TV DIRECTOR - "Thanks for having us at The Actors Cafe and for creating such a relaxed, positive and supportive environment."*

Apply at [actorscafe.co.uk/free-taster-class]

items.text: Come see Jerry's Girls at No Square Theatre in Laguna Beach!

sharedPost.text:
Don't miss the wonderful world of Jerry's Girls! Come join us for a fun night out where you'll be sure to be laughing and humming along to some of the greatest golden age musical theatre numbers! 

Tickets available at: https://www.tix.com/ticket-sales/nosquare/1804

In this dynamic musical revue, three Divas and three singing and dancing women celebrate the music of Jerry Herman, highlighting the broad spectrum of thrilling material he wrote specifically for female performers. This Broadway hit features all the best songs for women from such immortal musicals as Mame, Hello Dolly!, Milk and Honey, Mack and Mabel, A Day in Hollywood/A Night in the Ukraine, and La Cage Aux Folles.

It affectionately celebrates his special gift for writing songs that capture the true spirit of the American musical theatre. The all-female cast will remind us of how Jerry Herman has given voice to some of the most iconic roles, ballads and show-stoppers ever written for Broadway. A winner of the Tony, Grammy, Olivier, and Drama Desk Awards, Jerry Herman is the master tunesmith of our time.

items.text:
Hi Everyone! My name is Nick, and I am a former actor now pursuing a doctorate in clinical psychology. I am conducting a research study titled “Trauma in Training: The Psychological Consequences of Abusive Practices in Acting Programs,” which examines the impact of abusive practices on actors’ mental health during their training. I am currently seeking participants for a survey. If you are interested, participation in this study will involve completing a demographic questionnaire and three brief mental health measures. You will also have the option to provide additional details about your experiences if you wish to share them. Completion of the survey and questionnaires should take approximately 20 minutes.

**Even though it focuses on actors, I am also looking for non-actors to participate. **

To participate in this study, you must be at least 18 years of age, reside in the United States, be able to provide informed consent, and be able to read and understand English. All survey responses will be anonymous. Participation is voluntary and can be discontinued at any time and for any reason without consequences.

Additionally, it would be very helpful if you could share this survey with others. The more responses I get, the better!

**What are the risks of participating?**

Participants who have experienced physical, emotional, and/or sexual abuse may experience psychological discomfort and/or distress in the process of answering questions related to past experiences.

**What are the benefits of the study?**

There is no direct benefit to participating in this study. However, you will nonetheless contribute to existing research on the psychological issues facing actors, particularly during their training. This may be useful in developing more effective training methods and mental health resources for individuals working and training in the performing arts.

If you have any questions about this, feel free to DM me. Thanks in advance for your time!

items.text:
Casting Call for Leading Role in a Camden Fringe Production
Hello everyone! My name is Liam David Malcolm and I'm excited to announce that a team of us are premiering a new, queer play called Broken Boys to the Hen and Chicken Theatre on August 14th - 16th 😄

We're looking to cast one of two leading roles in this play, and want to hear from you 🫵

See below for more information! If you fit the brief, we'd love to hear from you, or if you know someone who might, please share along 🫶

🎬 JOHANNESBURG CASTING CALL | BEAUTIFUL FEMALE BACKGROUND TALENT NEEDED

We are currently looking for 10 confident, beautiful, “slay queen” type ladies for an upcoming Johannesburg shoot.

📍 Location: Johannesburg
📅 Shoot Date: Monday, 11 May
👩 Age Range: 22–30
🌍 Race: Black / Coloured
🎥 Role Type: Background Talent

Requirements:
• Must be well-groomed and camera-ready
• Strong on-camera presence
• Reliable and available for full shoot day
• Johannesburg-based 

To apply, send:
• Clear recent photos
• Full name
• Age
• Contact number
• Location

WhatsApp applications to: 069 221 5294

Only suitable applicants will be contacted.
007 Casting Agency

items.text:
Good morning @everyone you bunch of beautiful, talented individuals.

We know we’ve been a bit quiet recently, but there’s a very good reason for that.

Behind the scenes, we’ve been building something very special for this community. Something created to support actors, performers, creatives, and the wider UK screen and stage industry in a much better way.

And the best bit?...

It’s going to be FREE for our Casting Calls UK community.

We can’t say too much just yet, because we want to keep a little bit of mystery around it, but something new is coming very soon, and it’s been built with this group in mind.

To receive your invitation, all you need to do is make sure you’re following our Casting Calls UK page.

This community has always been about helping people find opportunities, stay motivated, and keep moving forward in an industry that can be tough, unpredictable, and sometimes frustrating.

So here’s your reminder:

Keep showing up.
Keep working on your craft.
Keep applying.
Keep believing in yourself, even when things feel slow.

Your next opportunity could come from anywhere, and very soon, we’ll be giving you another way to find it.

Big things are coming.

Thank you for sticking with us.

Casting Calls UK 🎬🇬🇧

items.text:
🎬 CASTING CALL – TikTok / Facebook Video Presenter (Manchester)

We’re looking for confident, natural on-camera presenters / actors to feature in short-form, social media-style videos, filmed on set in Manchester.

This is not traditional acting — we want people who feel comfortable talking directly to camera in a TikTok / Facebook Reels style. Think engaging, relatable, confident, and modern.

🔹 The Role

Present short, punchy scripts straight to camera

TikTok / Facebook-style delivery (15–60 seconds)

High-energy but natural — not cheesy or overly salesy

Filmed in a studio / set environment

🔹 Ideal For

Actors, presenters, creators, or confident personalities

Anyone comfortable being themselves on camera

People who understand short-form social video

Strong communication and screen presence

🔹 What We’re Looking For

Confident speaking to camera

Clear, engaging delivery

Able to follow a script or bullet points

Professional, reliable, and adaptable

🔹 Location

📍 Manchester – on set

🔹 How to Apply

Please send a short video (phone-recorded is absolutely fine) showing:

You speaking directly to camera

TikTok / presenter-style delivery

30–60 seconds is perfect 

📧 Email your video to:

david.s@springbokgroup.co.uk

Include:

Your name

Age range

Location

Any relevant experience (optional)

 

Paid opportunity.

We’re reviewing submissions on a rolling basis.

sharedPost.text:
A brave creative space, or even a wonderfully dangerous space, can only truly exist if the base line is safety. The first thing to die is creativity if the person does not feel inherently safe in the space. 

Creating good quality consent is crucial in our Meisner practice. Human beings can be tremendously tactile animals and our search for connection is primary in our instincts whether we like to admit it or not. The trick is how to create good quality consent, agreement for contact and respect for boundaries, without putting actors in their heads. 

Remember Meisner training is meant to be about the following of impulse. A conflict of interest? Not nessecarily. 

Good quality consent work is just another form of training in how to listen. Consent is all about listening. And at the very bottom line in acting. If acting is about doing then the doing is the listening. 

At Body Mind Voice we incorporate good quality consent practices, from the very beginning of our training right through to the extremes. Making it a part of the inherent listening in our training. 

A ‘safe’ spaces can give way to bold creative spaces. And bold creative spaces can give way to glorious  dangerous story telling. And after all, that’s what we buy tickets to see. 

Come train with us – www.bodymindvoice.co.uk

#actingclasslondon #londonactingstudio #londonactor #actortraining

sharedPost.text:
How to Get Featured on "Rena Le Wena"

Do you have a story to tell?
We are looking for South Africans of all ages who are ready to speak up about the challenges they face and the solutions they envision. Whether it’s a community issue like illegal dumping or a personal struggle you want to overcome, Rena Le Wena is here with you.

How to apply:
Send an email to infosodieskasitv@gmail.com with the following details:

Subject: To be featured on Rena Le wena

Full Name & Surname:

Location: (Where you live)

Interview Location: Gauteng,Soweto in meadowlands zone 10 Tiyimiseni Primary School 

The Challenge: Describe the issue and what kind of change you want to make.

Media: Attach pictures or videos of the challenge (e.g., dumping sites, road conditions, etc.) if applicable.

Networking: State if you need us to connect you with specific people or organizations to help make the change.

Commitment: Confirm if you are willing to stay consistent on this 3-week journey.

Be the voice of the community. Let’s make a difference together!

 #RenaLeWena #SodiesKasiTV #Meadowlands #KasiNews #sowetochallenge #southafrican

sharedPost.text:
AUDITION NOTICE: Barefoot in the Park

Barefoot in the Park by Neil Simon follows Paul and Corie Bratter, a pair of newlyweds moving into their first apartment in 1960s Greenwich Village. The honeymoon phase is quickly tested by a tiny, top-floor walk-up with no heat, a hole in the skylight, and a cast of eccentric neighbours. As Paul’s straight-laced legal mind clashes with Corie’s spontaneous, free-spirited nature, the couple must navigate their first major marital spat and decide if they can truly walk "barefoot in the park" together.

Creative Team:        Director: Julianne Christie          Producers: Janet Ellis, Michele Partridge

Production Details:
Audition Date: May 20, 2026
Audition & Performance Location: Peninsula Studio Theatre, 14600 North Bluff Rd, White Rock, BC
Rehearsals: Specific Dates TBD. June – September 2026
Performance Dates: September 17 – 27, 2026
Compensation: Actor Honorarium provided.
Perks: Free parking and food/refreshments provided at all rehearsals.

Character Breakdown:
Corie Bratter (Lead, Female, 20s to 30s): A free-spirited, optimistic newlywed who sees the world through rose-colored glasses. Must have high energy and excellent comedic timing.
Paul Bratter (Lead, Male, 20s–30s): HAS BEEN CAST
***Ethel Banks (Supporting, Female, 40s–60s): Corie’s cautious and slightly weary mother. She finds herself on an unexpected adventure thanks to her daughter.
Victor Velasco (Supporting, Male, 40s–60s): The eccentric, colourful, and flirtatious neighbour from the attic. A larger-than-life character.
Telephone Repairman (Supporting, Open Age/Male): A grounded character who gets a front-row seat to the Bratters' domestic chaos.
Delivery Person (Supporting, Open Age/Male): A comedic role focused on the physical toll of climbing those six flights of stairs.

**Submission Instructions:
Please email your headshot and resume to: Janet Ellis, Executive Director, janet@peninsulaproductions.org

Selection Process: Sides and a specific audition time will be emailed to those selected to audition on May 20.
Deadline: Please submit your materials promptly for consideration.

We look forward to hearing from you!

#auditions #play #summer #actors

items.text:
We're in Vancouver!
Hello Hollywood North! Howard here from Repunzel (https://www.instagram.com/repunzelforactors/), and I was sent here by one of your actors on the r/VancouverActors subreddit.

We are an agent submission app that's pretty popular in the US and we've been getting quite a few requests for lists outside of the US markets, so we made one for our neighbors to the north! We are now looking for a few beta testers for our Vancouver Agent List.

**Details:**

The beta test is completely free. You'll have full access to the app with all features unlocked.

We're looking for 5-10 Vancouver actors with all varying degrees of experience who are looking for representation.

You can be unrepresented or looking to change your representation.

Actors of color are very encouraged to apply!

You'll be asked to give some brief feedback about the experience afterwards.

‎

https://forms.gle/TSMKLvMSZagC8rrG9

‎

If you have any questions about the beta or the service in general, feel free to DM me.

Looking forward to helping a few actors on here get some fantastic representation!

Thank you!

Howard

This brief screening helps us learn a little more about you so we can make sure the list is a great fit. If selected, you'll receive a personalized link to use our newly launched Vancouver Agent list competely free for our beta....

items.text:
Documentary

Adults 60+

Volunteer 

I’m developing a small independent documentary project in Vancouver about older adults who have something they want to do, try, learn, experience, or share.  

The goal is not achievement — just honest human stories.

I’m looking for people around 60+ who may be interested in having a conversation and potentially participating in the documentary.

This is a small volunteer-based independent project with no acting experience required.

If interested, please send an email to **pikedreamsfilms@gmail.com** You’re also welcome to send a short video introducing yourself and sharing something you would still like to do, experience, or express in your life.

topComments.text: I am 70 next weekend the 23 of May and was in Canadian Army Reserve in 1976 era and now a Lions Club member for last 46 years, a Mason for 25 years and also a Shriner before Covid happened. . Also a Scout leader in 1978 and 79 before Lions club. I am a very proud Canadian. Besides i wasn't even a Canadian citizen but got into the Canadian forces..I am keen on working with you and your organization. Thanks.
I am just 50 but I like to do this volunteer, can I ?

items.summary:
Documentary

Adults 60+

Volunteer 

I’m developing a small independent documentary project in Vancouver about older adults who have something they want to do, try, learn, experience, or share.  

The goal is not achievement — just honest human stories.

I’m looking for people around 60+ who may be interested in having a conversation and potentially participating in the documentary.

This is a small volunteer-based independent project with no acting experience required.

If interested, please send an email to **pikedreamsfilms@gmail.com** You’re also welcome to send a short video introducing yourself and sharing something you would still like to do, experience, or express in your life.

items.text:
Do najnowszego odcinka GLINIARZY realizowanego w Warszawie (oraz bliskich okolicach) szukam:

• Kwiatos (27) - drobny złodziejaszek i włamywacz, ale z grubą kartoteką. Niepozorny, krótko ostrzyżony, wytatuowany. Sprawny fizycznie, szczupły.
DATA: 25.05
STAWKA: 400 zł netto

• Mario (29) - podobnie jak Kwiatos, złodziejaszek, włamywacz; na koncie rozboje. Zwinny i sprawny fizycznie, w stylu dresiarza z osiedla. 
DATA: 25.05
STAWKA: 400 zł netto

• Zuza (25) - dziewczyna Kwiatosa. Sympatyczna dziewczyna, drobna blondynka. Mocno pogubiona, uwikłana w związek z niewłaściwym człowiekiem. Emocjonalna i zaangażowana w śledztwo.
DATA: 25.05 i 26.05
STAWKA: 1000 zł netto za 2 dni

• Babcia Zuzy (69) - poczciwa kobieta, kocha wnuczkę, jednak prawdziwe tło sprawy jest dla niej szokiem.  Mocno zaangażowana w relacje z wnuczką. 
DATA: 26.05
STAWKA: 600 zł netto

• Misiak (43) - człowiek od brudnej roboty., ktoś w rodzaju prywatnego detektywa. Silny i dobrze zbudowany, postawny, groźny. Wygląda na kogoś z kim nie warto zadzierać. 
KONIECZNE PRAWO JAZDY
DATA: 25.05 i 26.05
STAWKA: 1200 zł netto

• Dawidowski (41) - skompromitowany menadżer z branży IT. Typ playboya i eleganta - przystrzyżony zarost, przycięte włosy, bywalec siłowni, człowiek sukcesu. Chciwy i bezwzględny. 
DATA: 26.05
STAWKA: 600 zł netto

• Kumpel Maria (31) - bez znak i cech charakterystycznych, typek spod ciemnej gwiazdy.
DATA: 25.05
STAWKA: 300 zł netto

• Petent (58) - spokojny i zatroskany facet, który składa zeznania. 
DATA: 25.05
STAWKA: 300 zł netto

Zgłoszenia przyjmujemy TYLKO MAILOWO.

Zainteresowane osoby proszę o zgłoszenia na adres: outsetola@op.pl
W tytule e-maila proszę o wpisanie nazwy postaci.

- Wiek, wzrost, waga

items.title: Do najnowszego odcinka GLINIARZY realizowanego w Warszawie (oraz bliskich okolicach) szukam:

items.text:
Do najnowszego odcinka GLINIARZY realizowanego w Warszawie (oraz bliskich okolicach) szukam:

- Damian Piechoski (29) – pracownik gospodarstwa Henryka, okradł go po śmierci. Nie wyróżnia się z wyglądu, średnia budowa ciała. AKTOR PO SZKOLE LUB KURSACH
DATA: 26.05
STAWKA: 700 zł netto

- Sąsiadka (61) – Janina Krawiec, sąsiadka Henryka, znalazła jego ciało. Lubiła Henryka, znała jego konflikt z bratankiem. Spostrzegawcza, szczera, pomocna.  
DATA: 26.05
STAWKA: 400 zł netto

- Zbigniew Gosek (37) – bratanek Henryka, drobny oszust, kieszonkowiec. Nerwowy, chaotyczny. Drobnej postury. Lekko zaniedbany i zapuszczony. Był skonfliktowany z Henrykiem. Pracuje na taksówce. Umie biegać. 
AKTOR PO SZKOLE LUB KURSACH
DATA: 26.05 i 27.05
STAWKA: 1400 zł netto za 2 dni

- Mirek – Mirosław Bednarz (56) – rolnik, dalszy sąsiad Henryka, sprawca nieumyślnego zabójstwa. Krzepki, mocno zbudowany. Brutalny wobec żony, przemocowy. 
DATA: 27.05
STAWKA: 500 zł netto

- Mariola Bednarz (55) – żona Mirka, ofiara przemocy domowej. Drobna wiejska kobieta, ubiera się skromnie. Żyje w strachu przed mężem. Poszła z mężem do Henryka, była przy kłótni i śmierci. Z wyrzutów sumienia próbowała skontaktować się z policją, za co została pobita przez męża. 
DATA: 27.05
STAWKA: 600 zł netto

- Sławek Szymkowiak (26) – znajomy Zbyszka, dresik, drobny złodziej.
DATA: 27.05
STAWKA: 400 zł netto

Zgłoszenia przyjmujemy TYLKO MAILOWO.

Zainteresowane osoby proszę o zgłoszenia na adres: outsetola@op.pl
W tytule e-maila proszę o wpisanie nazwy postaci.
W treści:
- Wiek, wzrost, waga

-Igor Zawadzki (29) – trener personalny w klubie fitness. Sprawny fizycznie, umięśniona sylwetka, dobrze biega. Nieustannie myśli o seksie, młodych dziewczynach, w aplikacjach kupuje nagie zdjęcia od dziewczyn – jara go to. Wąskie sportowe dresy, obcisły t-shirt termiczny – strój podkreślający mięśnie. 
KONIECZNE PRAWO JAZDY
DATA: 20.05 i 21.05
STAWKA: 1200 zł netto za 2 dni

STAWKA: 600 zł netto

Casting Call
For my Halloween party and trailer. A comeback featuring a brand-new concept—something that has never been seen before here in Germany.
Are you an actor, singer, dancer, model, acrobat, musician, performer, artist, fire-breather, drag queen, magician? or do you possess another talent that you are eager to show to me and my Jury ?

Düsseldorf: May 22nd
Cologne: June 12th

Application: castingvhn@yahoo.com

attachments.ocrText: May be an image of text that says 'EINLADUNG Jedermann Theater mit jeder Menge Film Weigend Rolle Stars und der Grazer Filmgröße liebe Partner*innen, dürfen GRAZ den BUHNEN Alle. Der edermann Grazer den freuen. großer Vorfreude laden Berg September 2026. Bühne Erfüllung, bringen: gemeinsam zum kulinarischen Auftakt, den vergolden ein persönliches Graz WANN: WO: WER: Uhr Mai, Kasematten, Forster Regisseur Umgebung Schauspieler Michael ,Schauspielerin Tegeler, und Franz, weiteren unter Stugger, Weigend Graz etwas Nicolai Tegeler, Firma| ILIKE STORIES GmbH, Berlin, nicht einfach ,Jedermann" aber Region wieder Inszenierung, wirtschaftlich. große Morgenstern, etwas Besonderes klingende Erol Sander Tod, Dorkas Wittler Alexandra Kamp, Iris wie Markus viele Susanne Ralph www.regiongraz.at'

items.text:
Am 25. August 2007 fand die historische Loveparade in Essen statt. Der erste Umzug der Mega-Musikveranstaltung aus Berlin in den Ruhrpott war mit 1,2 Millionen Besucher ein Riesenerfolg und ging mit "Ruhr in Love" in die Musikgeschichte ein.Die Stimmung war super und niemand konnte ahnen, dass in 3 Jahren Alles mit einem tödlichen Chaos zu Ende geht!

On August 25, 2007, the historic Love Parade took place in Essen. The first relocation of this mega-music event from Berlin to the Ruhr region was a resounding success, drawing 1.2 million visitors, and went down in music history under the banner "Ruhr in Love." The atmosphere was fantastic, and no one could have imagined that, just three years later, it would all come to a tragic end amidst deadly chaos.

items.text:
**Mini serial  wojenny 1940 – Szukamy aktora żandarmeria państwowa (casting – on-line)**

 

Nasza Gliwicka Grupa Pasjonatów **‘’Morskie opowieści’’** poszukuje mężczyzny do roli szeregowego niemieckiego żandarmerii polowej. Żołnierz ten wystąpi w dwóch  odcinkach 2 i 3 odcinku podczas zatrzymania kobiety, jednej z kluczowych postaci. Tekst będzie po niemiecku. Przewidujemy wcześniej kilka sesji testowych. Bardzo ważnymi czynnikami będą parametry kandydata: **obwód w klatce 90 –95 cmwzrost 170 – 175 obraz pas 85 –90 cm. **Szukamy kogoś **z Gliwic lub okolic: Zabrze, Katowice** najdalej. Same zdjęcia będą realizowane na terenie Gliwic. Niestety nie zwracamy kosztów podróży. Postać mężczyzny pojawi się w pierwszym odcinku i zostanie zabita przez odział niemiecki. Oczywiście mile widziane doświadczenie pracy z tekstem.

 

**Od maja 2026 planujemy realizacje zdjęc do tego **projektu. Będziemy realizować mini serial oparty o wątki grupy okultystycznej ’’**Ahnenerbe’**’ która chce zdobyć słynne artefakty ale w tym ktoś im chce przeszkadzać. Projekt będzie  się składać z 6 odcinków po 10/12 minut każdy. Będziemy też sukcesywnie dodawać inne ogłoszenia związane z tym projektem. Mile widziane zdjęcia aktualne. Na zdjęciu powyżej osoba będzie mieć podobny kostium.** **Umieszczone materiały są z naszej sesji.** Nie będzie to zlecenie płatne.**

 

Od 01.04.25 założyliśmy swój kanał na portalu youtube z filmami z naszych planów żeby można było zobaczyć jak to u nas wygląda od kuchni. 

 

https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCE8KyfwpyFGzzwUDqdwy74g

 

**Nie będzie to zlecenie płatne.**

 

Więcej informacji na Priv

**Serial nie jest stworzony z sympatii do tej nazistowskiej organizacji lecz wynika to z samego scenariusza aby ukazał zbrodnie i sam fakt iż była w pełni zła. W produkcji znajdą się osoby, które będą chcieć walczyć i potępiać te wielkie zło jakim był nazizm. W oparciu o Dz.U.2017.0.2204 t.j. - Ustawa z dnia 6 czerwca 1997 r. - Kodeks karny,Art. 256 "Propagowanie faszyzmu lub innego ustroju totalitarnego lub nawoływanie domnienawiści", §3 - nie narusza prawa proponując przedmiot do celów historycznych lub kolekcjonerskich.**

👠 AUDITIONS REOPENED 👠

The Panto Theatre is officially reopening auditions for the role of the Wicked Stepmother in Cinderella!

This deliciously dramatic role is perfect for performers who love comedy, big personality, and stealing every scene they enter. Because naturally the villain gets the best lines. Theatre has known this for centuries.

📅 Contract: Now – December 31, 2026
🎭 Volunteer Acting Position (No Pay)

We currently have 6 booked performances in Tooele and Provo, with additional shows expected to be added over time.

Please make sure to submit all conflicts in your audition email. Check the graphic for full audition instructions!

items.text:
FIRST CLASS FREE! - Thursday 14/05 7-8pm

Mondays 6.30pm - 7.30pm (First class £3)

Both classes are BRAND NEW ROUTINES so it’s a great time to jump and start fresh! 🙌

sharedPost.text:
Smashed it last night in ADULT BEGINNERS! Quick session, all learned in an hour, drilling out the moves and working on our speed of movement in a faster, more commercial routine. Is it perfection? No! But for an hours hard graft they ROCKED IT! 🥰🙌 And the vibe was insane! 👌

Why not come and join us next time? This class is for anybody, even if you haven’t danced before!! With my guidance you’ll be amazed what you can do! (Details in the comments.) 

#liverpooldance #beginnersdance #liverpoolfitness #Liverpool #starttheweek

items.text:
CASTING: HOST (Social Media Presenter)
We’re looking for a charismatic female host for long-term collaboration 🙏✨

Format:

Host/presenter for:

-Instagram Stories

-Instagram channel / Reels

-Telegram channel

Responsibilities:

-Recording videos based on scripts

-Announcements

-Behind-the-scenes content

-Lifestyle content / audience interaction

Requirements:

-Female, 18–30

-Attractive appearance, well-groomed

-Confident on camera, charismatic, with lively energy

-Clear diction and a pleasant voice

Languages:

-Fluent Russian

-English (preferably without a strong accent)

On-camera experience is a plus (blogging, hosting, acting)

Collaboration format:

-Regular shoots

-Long-term contract

-Work based on content plans and scripts

If you’re interested, send me a DM 🙏

sharedPost.text:
KULADHARA — VILLAGE ENTRANCE — DUSK

The Ghost Box
Written by Basha penukonda 

A river of bodies flows out of Kuldhara.
One man flows in.
ADITYA. Backpack. Steady eyes. Wrong direction.
The fleeing villagers part around him like water around stone — stealing glances, saying nothing at first. Then the whispers start.
MAN #1
(low, almost to himself)
Madman.
MAN #2
(to his wife)
Don't look at him. Bad omen.
An OLD MAN spits on the ground near Aditya's feet. Not at him.
A warning.
MAN #3
(calling out)
Hey! Boy!
(Aditya doesn't turn)
…God help him.
Aditya walks on.
Then — a sound cuts through the chaos.
A dry, hollow CRACK.
He turns.
An OLD WOMAN — nearly seventy, frail as paper — lies face-down in the dust. Her crooked walking stick has rolled two feet away. The crowd flows around her like she isn't there.
No one stops.
Aditya drops his bag and runs.
He kneels beside her. Gently — like handling something already broken — he turns her over. Lifts her up.
ADITYA
Easy. Easy, grandma.
(checking her face)
Where does it hurt?
The old woman's eyes find his.
Something shifts in them. Not relief. Not gratitude.
Fear.
She pulls her wrist back from his grip.
OLD WOMAN
Don't.
ADITYA
You're bleeding—
OLD WOMAN
Don't touch me.
(a broken whisper)
I am cursed.
The sins of my ancestors… they live in my blood.
Everyone in this village knows.
A beat.
OLD WOMAN (CONT'D)
That is why they left me last.
She says it without self-pity. A simple fact. Like weather.
The crowd thins around them. The last few stragglers are moving fast now, eyes forward, pretending not to see.
Aditya opens his water bottle. Holds it out.
She stares at it.
Then drinks.
A long silence between them — just wind through empty streets.
OLD WOMAN
(not looking at him)
Why are you walking toward it?
(finally turning)
What kind of man chooses to enter a place
that an entire village is running from?
ADITYA
The kind who has something to finish.
OLD WOMAN
(sharp)
Finish it somewhere else. Go home.
You don't know what lives here after dark.
She grabs his arm. Her grip — surprisingly fierce.
OLD WOMAN (CONT'D)
It doesn't kill you fast.
It makes you stay.
The wind dies.
Sudden. Complete.
Like Kuldhara itself just held its breath.
Aditya slowly looks up at the village ahead.
The last light is draining out of the sky.
He gently loosens her grip. Places the walking stick back in her hand. Closes her fingers around it.
ADITYA
(quietly)
Go. Before dark catches you too.
He picks up his bag.
OLD WOMAN
(calling after him)
Boy—
He pauses. Doesn't turn.
OLD WOMAN (CONT'D)
(almost inaudible)
Don't let it learn your name.
A beat.
Aditya walks forward.
The last villager watches from the road behind him — an old man, shielding his eyes against nothing.
Aditya doesn't look back.
The darkness doesn't wait.
It reaches for him first.

items.text:
Hi,

I’m looking for a cinematographer who can also edit for a narrative short film.

📍 Location: Elysian Park, Los Angeles
🎬 Project: 20-minute short film (festival submission)
📅 Shoot: One full day (up to 24 hours)

⚠️ IMPORTANT:
This project requires prior experience working on narrative films intended for festivals. Please do not apply if you have not worked on festival-bound short films or similar narrative projects.

You should understand:
 • cinematic storytelling
 • visual pacing
 • working efficiently on set
 • festival-level production expectations

I’m open to students or emerging filmmakers, but only if you already have relevant festival/narrative film experience.

💵 Budget: $150 (passion project / micro-budget)

This is for someone who values storytelling and wants to contribute to a serious festival-oriented film.

Please include:
 • reel / portfolio
 • festival or narrative film experience
 • availability

**CASTING CALL –** ***OMG Stories ***

Hi, my name is Mireille and I’m a Casting Agent at Upstream Media leading the search for contributors for the ongoing series ***OMG Stories: Up Close.*** We are looking for individuals with extraordinary lived experiences who would be interested in sharing their story in their own words.

**Details:**

📍 Location: Central London
📅 Shoot dates: Ongoing
💷 Paid opportunity (£££)

**Requirements:**
• All ages welcome
• All genders welcome
• Must be based in the UK or willing to travel

**If you’re interested, please send:**
• A brief summary of your story
• A video link or self-tape

📧 Email: [mireille.lee@upstream-media.co.uk](mailto:mireille.lee@upstream-media.co.uk)

items.text:
'Fires in the Heather' - CASTING CALL

Project: 
Short film (proof of concept for feature)

Genre: 
Inspirational fantasy drama with comic beats
Rehearsal & shoot: Early September 2026 — in and around Edinburgh (availability required)

Logline:
Mavis Paterson, an indomitable 80-year-old cyclist in a pink evening gown, rides across the Scottish Highlands with a mischievous grin. After a minor tumble, a reluctant good Samaritan escorts her into Edinburgh, where small kindnesses and quiet rituals reveal the heart behind a national icon.

Roles (x3):
Mavis Paterson- Female, 78–85. Spirited, athletic, warm, wry. Must be comfortable riding a bike and light physicality (gentle tumble). Luminous, lived-in charm. 
https://ohwafilm.com/casting-call/mavis-fires-in-the-heather-short/

Declan - Male, 45–60. Working-class, big-set, awkward but tender. Stoic exterior that softens. Naturalistic delivery; uneasy with attention. 
https://ohwafilm.com/casting-call/declan-fires-in-the-heather-short/

Jane - Female, 25–35. Bright, effusive, digitally savvy. Energetic, warm, quick with humour and selfies.
https://ohwafilm.com/casting-call/jane-fires-in-the-heather-short/

Additional info:
Rehearsal & filming: Early September 2026, Edinburgh area — you must be available. 

Rates:
See individual casting notices. 

Reference (real Mavis): 
https://lnkd.in/djezjbb3

Full details: 
https://ohwafilm.com/casting-calls/

Submissions:
Email self-tape and CV to casting@ohwafilm.com
Deadline for initial self-tapes: 05/31/2026
Queries / agents: cc your agent or direct questions to the same email.

items.text:
CASTING CALL – FEMALE ACTOR NEEDED (Walsall) 

Project: The Professional (Short Film) 

Location: Walsall 

Shoot Duration: 1 day (this week) 

Role Needed: Female actor (playing “Foxy Brown”) 

Age Range: Not below 18 and not older than 25  

Genre: Crime / Drama 

Paid/Unpaid: Unfortunately, this is unpaid, but i can cover transport.  

Student Production: Creative Media Level 3 Final Major Project 

 

About the Film 

Old relationship reignites as a detective visits a suspect in a murder, However, it’s too late when he realizes he’s been lead to his demise.  

 

About the Role 

Pretty much a Femme fatale, charismatic, intelligent, composed, always one step ahead. The role involves dialogue-heavy scenes, and shifting power dynamic between her and the detective. There are no intimate scenes and no physical contact, everything is implied with how they move and look at each other. There’s suspense, tension and mystery but nothing graphic.  

Scene Tone 

The script features: 
* A tense conversation between the femme fatale  and the Detective 
* Subtle back and forth between the both of them. 
* A twist where Foxy reveals she’s not as harmless as she seems. 

(If anyone wants to read the full script, I can send it privately.) 

Requirements 
* Able to film in Walsall 
* Available for a one‑day shoot this week 
* Reliable and punctual 

How to Apply 

Just respond under this post.

topComments.text: Definitely interested! Would love to hear more.

STARS OF TOMORROW 

 @croydoncd_ Croydon

 Saturday 10th October

Models of Diversity is proud to present an unforgettable catwalk experience for young people aged 11–18 who have experienced adversity 

This empowering show is all about celebrating confidence, courage, individuality, and self-expression through fashion, fun, and creativity, with clothing from top brands including @newlook @nextofficial @prettylittlething @ganni and many more 

Our young stars will receive:

 Professional hair & make-up

 Wardrobe styling

 Catwalk coaching

 The chance to shine on the runway in front of family and friends

We’re looking for nominations from:

 Teachers

 Parents

 Responsible adults

To nominate a young person, please email:

 info@modelsofdiversity.org

Please include:

• First name & age

• A recent photo

• A short paragraph explaining why they would benefit from taking part

• Parent/guardian consent and contact details

Let’s celebrate bravery, resilience, and the stars of tomorrow 

[#StarsOfTomorrow](https://www.facebook.com/watch/hashtag/starsoftomorrow/?__cft__[0]=AZZfIOYKuYra5cb6QAErK9MDfw5opHf2A1_Puq70PGl09TLiW5sM3rYtfVnmgUxtuL2SelARQRqW2594h-TR9-fPcL6gIm8AmvO8qbgkHE6qY2LMKu-7E4NBHbkZOy4w4lBKZF_PHTCbZix3CqhJaZITQdFjpwzU3-M-nTVICAqswLKdQIUPrkvEMuSEM12Q1MlMKDNML2wfgpIDr3Mx1x8P&__tn__=*NK-R) [#ModelsOfDiversity](https://www.facebook.com/watch/hashtag/modelsofdiversity/?__cft__[0]=AZZfIOYKuYra5cb6QAErK9MDfw5opHf2A1_Puq70PGl09TLiW5sM3rYtfVnmgUxtuL2SelARQRqW2594h-TR9-fPcL6gIm8AmvO8qbgkHE6qY2LMKu-7E4NBHbkZOy4w4lBKZF_PHTCbZix3CqhJaZITQdFjpwzU3-M-nTVICAqswLKdQIUPrkvEMuSEM12Q1MlMKDNML2wfgpIDr3Mx1x8P&__tn__=*NK-R) [#Croydon](https://www.facebook.com/watch/hashtag/croydon/?__cft__[0]=AZZfIOYKuYra5cb6QAErK9MDfw5opHf2A1_Puq70PGl09TLiW5sM3rYtfVnmgUxtuL2SelARQRqW2594h-TR9-fPcL6gIm8AmvO8qbgkHE6qY2LMKu-7E4NBHbkZOy4w4lBKZF_PHTCbZix3CqhJaZITQdFjpwzU3-M-nTVICAqswLKdQIUPrkvEMuSEM12Q1MlMKDNML2wfgpIDr3Mx1x8P&__tn__=*NK-R) [#YouthEmpowerment](https://www.facebook.com/watch/hashtag/youthempowerment/?__cft__[0]=AZZfIOYKuYra5cb6QAErK9MDfw5opHf2A1_Puq70PGl09TLiW5sM3rYtfVnmgUxtuL2SelARQRqW2594h-TR9-fPcL6gIm8AmvO8qbgkHE6qY2LMKu-7E4NBHbkZOy4w4lBKZF_PHTCbZix3CqhJaZITQdFjpwzU3-M-nTVICAqswLKdQIUPrkvEMuSEM12Q1MlMKDNML2wfgpIDr3Mx1x8P&__tn__=*NK-R) [#InclusiveFashion](https://www.facebook.com/watch/hashtag/inclusivefashion/?__cft__[0]=AZZfIOYKuYra5cb6QAErK9MDfw5opHf2A1_Puq70PGl09TLiW5sM3rYtfVnmgUxtuL2SelARQRqW2594h-TR9-fPcL6gIm8AmvO8qbgkHE6qY2LMKu-7E4NBHbkZOy4w4lBKZF_PHTCbZix3CqhJaZITQdFjpwzU3-M-nTVICAqswLKdQIUPrkvEMuSEM12Q1MlMKDNML2wfgpIDr3Mx1x8P&__tn__=*NK-R) BodyConfidence CatwalkExperience FashionForAll SelfExpression YoungPeople CroydonEvents

Models of Diversity is proud to present an unforgettable catwalk experience for young people aged 11–18 who have experienced adversity 💜

This empowering show is all about celebrating confidence, courage, individuality, and self-expression through fashion, fun, and creativity, with clothing from top brands including @newlook @nextofficial @prettylittlething @ganni and many more 

Our young stars will receive:

💄 Professional hair & make-up

👗 Wardrobe styling

🚶🏽‍♀️ Catwalk coaching

🎉 The chance to shine on the runway in front of family and friends

We’re looking for nominations from:

✔️ Teachers

✔️ Parents

✔️ Responsible adults

To nominate a young person, please email:

📧 info@modelsofdiversity.org

Please include:

• First name & age

• A recent photo

• A short paragraph explaining why they would benefit from taking part

• Parent/guardian consent and contact details

Let’s celebrate bravery, resilience, and the stars of tomorrow ⭐

#StarsOfTomorrow #ModelsOfDiversity #Croydon #YouthEmpowerment #InclusiveFashion BodyConfidence CatwalkExperience FashionForAll SelfExpression YoungPeople CroydonEvents

items.text:
In episode 44 of Beyond Reel Talk podcast I talk to Sophia Priolo. She is an American actor, classically trained ballet dancer, classical singer and choreographer based in London.

We talk about her childhood in Alabama, discovering dance at a young age, and the discipline and toughness that came with ballet training.

We also discuss storytelling through movement, the connection between dance and acting, choreographing “A Time for Everything”, the pressure artists put on themselves, and how important it is to recognize your worth both as an artist and as a person... And much more.
items.previewTitle: No tears! There’s no business like show business! - Sophia Priolo - #BeyondReelTalk ep. 44

We talk about her childhood in Alabama, discovering dance at a young age, and the discipline and toughness that came with ballet training.

We also discuss storytelling through movement, the connection between dance and acting, choreographing “A Time for Everything”, the pressure artists put on themselves, and how important it is to recognize your worth both as an artist and as a person... And much more.

🎬 India Week Film Conclave — Drinks Reception | London
London filmmakers — this one's for you.

Join us for the India Week Film Conclave Drinks Reception and meet 200+ filmmakers, funders, actors, casting agents and production houses in one room.

Industry leads from BFI and Film London will be in attendance, alongside international talent arriving fresh from Cannes.

ReelN is proud to be a partner of this event 🎉

🎟 Get your tickets: indiaweek.uk/film

⚠️ Use code REELN5 for £5 off — expires THIS FRIDAY

@indiaweeklondon

Call for volunteers -- extras/background performers
We are looking for some more extras for a UBC Film Production graduate thesis film, Mon. May 11, 9am-2pm at UBC. The scene is at a Ted Talk-type event with an astronaut recently returned from Mars. 
Crafty provided, UBCP ULB, professional crew.
Please email dreamersproduction2026@gmail.com
Thank you!

(Artemis pic for inspo!)

attachments.ocrText: No photo description available.

topComments.text: Thanks folks, we had a great day! Glad to have found this group :)

items.text:
CASTING CALL - CHILD ACTOR

Seeking a boy (age 5–8) for the lead role in SEMI ALIVE / MAX, an emotionally driven short film about childhood and survival during war.

Character:�MAX - a playful six-year-old boy whose innocent game in the forest turns into a fight for survival.
No extensive dialogue. Strong emotional presence and natural behavior on camera are most important.

Project Details:�• One shooting day( Date TBD, preliminary- May 18�• Volunteer / unpaid�• Food, transportation support, and festival credit provided�• Filming Vancouver, forest 

Directed by Annika Irving�Produced/Written by Alex Zhmudskyi

This film aims to raise awareness about mined territories and the impact of war on children.

To apply, please send:�• recent photos�• age and height�• any acting experience (if available)�• short self-tape or introduction

Email: semialivemax@gmail.com

topComments.text: My son Austin would love to be considered!

items.text:
**CASTING CALL – PAID, NON-UNION COMMERCIAL**

Novel Productions is casting **three roles** for a 1**5-second commercial** for Applewood Auto Group.

**Shoot Location:** Langley, BC

**Shoot Date:** May 19, 2026 (3-10 hours, depending on role)

**Compensation:** $600-1000 (Including buyout)

**ROLES:**

• **Customer** — Age **35–35** | Male, ethnicity open

• **Used Car Salesman** — Age **45–55** | Male, ethnicity open

• **Applewood Sales Rep** — Age **35–55** | Gender & ethnicity open

**SUBMISSIONS:**

Please send **headshot, acting resume, and reel (if available)** to: **casting@novelproductions.ca**

**Subject line:**

*Applewood Casting - Role Name - Your Name*

Usage will be in perpetuity. Additional usage details will be provided to selected talent.

Selected submissions will be contacted with sides and instructions for self-tape auditions.

We encourage submissions from actors of all backgrounds.

attachments.ocrText: May be an image of text

topComments.text:
Wow....1000 bucks for a role " in perpetuity "    thereby mitigating ANY other car commercials one could do.....
Here's where a good agent advises you to think first.

sharedPost.text:
Proben. Gigs. Aufbau. Abbau. Repeat. 

Dein Abend gehört der Musik. Deshalb funktionieren die meisten Nebenjobs nicht. 

Sprachzünder sein schon. 

Du arbeitest am Vormittag. �Mit dem, was du liebst: Gitarre, Stimme, Begeisterung. Mehr brauchst du nicht. 

📩 Schreib uns eine DM, wenn du noch einen Nebenjob für den Vormittag suchst. 

#sprachzünder #sprachförderung #musikfürkinder #eloquio #musikverbindet

items.text:
🎬 CASTING – REKLAMA SKLEPU | WARSZAWA 🎬
Szukamy kobiet i mężczyzn z wyrazistym, naturalnym wizerunkiem w wieku 20–40 lat do reklamy sklepu.

📍 Zdjęcia: 20.05

🌿 Gramy plener

⏰ Godziny planu nie są jeszcze znane — prosimy o dyspozycyjność przez cały dzień

💰 Stawka: 1300 zł brutto

💳 Płatność przelewem

📩 Zgłoszenia prosimy wysyłać na:

plan@filmakcja.pl

✉️ Tytuł maila:

„Sklep wizerunek 20.05”

W zgłoszeniu prosimy o:

• imię i nazwisko

• wiek

• numer telefonu

• wyraźne zdjęcia twarzy i sylwetki

• wizytówkę aktorską

Czekamy na Wasze zgłoszenia 🎬✨

Marta Filmakcja 🎞️🫶

📍 Lokalizacja: Bielsko-Biała i okolice
📅 Termin zdjęć: 26–28.05 (3 dni zdjęciowe)
💰 Wynagrodzenie: 200 zł za każdy dzień zdjęciowy

Do realizacji projektu filmowego poszukujemy kobiety do dublerki znanej aktorki. Jeśli spełniasz poniższe wymagania lub znasz kogoś idealnego do tej roli — zgłoś się! ✨

🔸 Wymagania:
• ciemne, długie włosy
• wzrost 170–175 cm
• rozmiar ubrań 36–38

📩 Zgłoszenia prosimy wysyłać mailowo na adres: ludzie@unagimedia.pl 

W treści zawrzyj poniższe informacje:
• Imię i nazwisko
• wiek
• wzrost
• numer telefonu 
• zdjęcie twarzy oraz sylwetki
• rozmiar ubrań 

W tytule wiadomości wpisz: „DUBLERKA”

📢 Udostępnij post lub oznacz osobę, która pasuje do opisu! 🎥

🎬 **PILNY CASTING – SERIAL “IN COLD ICE”**
📍 **Bydgoszcz i okolice**

Szukamy aktorów do serialu **„In Cold Ice”**.
Zdjęcia odbywają się **w języku angielskim**.

📅 Termin zdjęć: **15–18 maja**
🎥 Jeden dzień zdjęciowy na rolę.
🔹 HOKEISTA
* młody mężczyzna
* sportowa sylwetka
* wymagana komunikatywna znajomość języka angielskiego
* jedna kwestia po angielsku

💰 Wynagrodzenie: **600 PLN brutto / dzień zdjęciowy**

🔹 OCHRONIARZ
* mężczyzna
* sportowa sylwetka
* rola bez kwestii

💰 Wynagrodzenie: **400 PLN brutto / dzień zdjęciowy**

🔹 PASTOR
* mężczyzna w średnim wieku
* bardzo dobra znajomość języka angielskiego
* rola z tekstem

💰 Wynagrodzenie: **1000 PLN brutto / dzień zdjęciowy**

📩 Osoby zainteresowane prosimy o wiadomość prywatną
i przesłanie od razu:
* krótkiego **self-introduction po angielsku**
* wieku
* aktualnych zdjęć
* doświadczenia aktorskiego (jeśli jest)

items.text:
🎬 CASTING CALL – KURZFILM „CARLINA“

Für unseren poetischen Kurzfilm *CARLINA* suchen wir Darsteller*innen für vier zentrale Rollen.

Der Film erzählt von Nähe, Sehnsucht, Verlust und unausgesprochenen Spannungen in der Abgeschiedenheit einer alpinen Bergwelt. Im Mittelpunkt stehen starke emotionale Präsenz, reduziertes Spiel und Ausdruck über Blick, Körpersprache und Stille.

📍 Drehort: Nähe Lunz am See, Niederösterreich
📅 Drehzeitraum: 05.06.2026 – 11.06.2026
🎞 Studentenproduktion / No-Budget
🍽 Unterkunft & Verpflegung vorhanden
🎥 Festival-Einreichungen geplant

Gesucht werden Darsteller*innen für die Rollen:
– Magdalena
– Johann
– Lukas
– Wolfgang

Alle weiteren Informationen zu Rollen, Anforderungen und Projekt findet ihr in den Bildern des Posts.

📩 Bewerbungen bitte bis spätestens **17.05.2026** an:
**hochland.kurzfilm@gmail.com**

Wir freuen uns auf eure Bewerbungen!

items.text:
Statisten aller Altersgruppen für inszenierte Hochzeit gesucht / Zürich, Schweiz 

Für ein studentisches Fotoprojekt und Film suche ich Models und Statisten aller Altersgruppen für eine inszenierte Hochzeit im Kanton Zürich. Vorkenntnisse oder eine bestimmte berufliche Tätigkeit sind nicht erforderlich.

Das Projekt ist leider unbezahlt. Als Dankeschön biete ich euch jedoch ein professionelles Fotoshooting oder auf Wunsch auch ein kleines Video- bzw. Content-Shooting für eure eigenen Bedürfnisse an – egal ob Portraits, Paarfotos, Bewerbungsbilder, Social Media oder etwas anderes.

Das Shooting findet im Mai/Juni statt und dauert ungefähr einen halben Tag. Für Essen und Getränke ist selbstverständlich gesorgt.

Bei Interesse freue ich mich über eine Nachricht mit ein paar Infos zu euch.

🎬 Across Cultures Film Festival — Official Announcement
We are excited to introduce the first edition of Across Cultures Film Festival, taking place in Bamberg, Germany on July 25, 2026.
A curated one-day event focused on powerful short films exploring identity, migration, and human connection across cultures.
✨ We are currently gathering interest from filmmakers worldwide.  
you can submit here:
https://filmfreeway.com/acrossculturesfilm
🎞️ Categories:
• Short Film  
• Cross-Cultural Story  
• Student Film  
📍 Bamberg, Germany  
📅 July 25, 2026  
💸 Free submission (o

items.text:
Do majowego odcinka serialu „Gliniarze”, realizowanego w Warszawie (i bliskich okolicach) poszukuję mężczyzn do następujących ról:

1.Dawid Worach (18) – Modny nastolatek, typ chłopaka, który podoba się dziewczynom.

Data: 28. maja
Stawka: 400 zł netto

2.Hubert Jaskólski (18) – Kolega podejrzanego o gwałt. Wie, że niesłusznie posądził kolegę i to przez niego tamten został brutalnie pobity, ale teraz nie chce się przyznać na policji.

Data: 28. maja
Stawka: 600 zł netto

3.Kamil Litwiniec (22) – brat zgwałconej dziewczyny, który chce się zemścić na gwałcicielu. Typ samca alfa, nadopiekuńczego starszego brata, porywczego, ale nie „głupiego osiłka”. Raczej z zamożnej rodziny, ale nie elegancik. KONIECZNE PRAWO JAZDY

Daty: 28., 29, i 30. maja
Stawka: 2100 zł netto za całość

4.Albert Wąsowski (21) – Elegancik. Manipulujący, toksyczny typ, którzy w rzeczywistości jest gwałcicielem. Krzywo mu z oczu patrzy, typ banana, narcyza, który o siebie dba. Dobrze zbudowany, ale nie koksik.

Daty: 28. i 29. maja
Stawka: 1400 zł netto za całość

5.Ojciec Woracha (49) – Zmartwiony tata, współpracuje z policją.

Data: 29. maja
Stawka: 400 zł netto
6.Łukasz – Typ silny, męski, ale raczej nie grzeszy rozumem. Jest okazja komuś nakopać, to on chętnie z niej skorzysta. Nie drechol, ale łysa bańka, tatuaże itp. mile widziane. 

Daty: 28. i 29. maja
Stawka: 800 zł netto za całość

7.Ratownik ZRM 

Data: 29. maja
Stawka: 300 zł netto

Chętnych Panów zapraszam do wysyłania zgłoszeń na adres: casting.outset@interia.pl

Proszę o zgłoszenia TYLKO mailowe, TYLKO od osób które nie grały w Gliniarzach w 2026 roku.

W tytule maila proszę o wpisanie nazwy postaci.

W treści maila proszę o zawarcie następujących informacji:

1. Wiek/wzrost/waga
2. Nr tel. Do kontaktu
3. Linki do sowich materiałów video – demo/wizytówka/scenki castingowe
4. Aktualne zdjęcie
5. Krótki opis doświadczenia
6. Informacje o ukończonych szkołach/kursach/warsztatach aktorskich
7. Informację o posiadanym i czynnym prawie jazdy lub jego braku

Nie zwracamy kosztów dojazdu/noclegu

Do majowego odcinka serialu „Gliniarze”, realizowanego w Warszawie (i bliskich okolicach) poszukuję kobiet do następujących ról:

1.Aśka Jaskólska (18) – Charakterystyczna relacja z bratem – ona jest bardziej wygadana, ale też nie zmarnuje okazji, żeby wsypać brata. Mówi szczerze, a z bratem często się kłóci. Chce działać dla jego dobra.

Data: 28. maja
Stawka: 500 zł netto

2.Klaudia Litwiniec (17) – Zgwałcona dziewczyna, siostra Kamila. Ładna, nie ma scen mówionych, ale załamana po gwałcie będzie próbowała popełnić samobójstwo przedawkowaniem leków przeciwbólowych 

Data: 29. maja
Stawka: 400 zł netto

3.Mama Klaudii (48) – Załamana losem córki, zamożna kobieta, która wychowuje dwójkę dzieci bez ojca.

3.Mama Klaudii (48) – Załamana losem córki, zamożna kobieta, która wychowuje dwójkę dzieci bez ojca.

Data: 29. maja
Stawka: 500 zł netto

Chętne Panie zapraszam do wysyłania zgłoszeń na adres: casting.outset@interia.pl

Proszę o zgłoszenia TYLKO mailowe, TYLKO od osób które nie grały w Gliniarzach w 2026 roku.

W tytule maila proszę o wpisanie nazwy postaci.

W treści maila proszę o zawarcie następujących informacji:

1. Wiek/wzrost/waga
2. Nr tel. Do kontaktu
3. Linki do sowich materiałów video – demo/wizytówka/scenki castingowe
4. Aktualne zdjęcie
5. Krótki opis doświadczenia
6. Informacje o ukończonych szkołach/kursach/warsztatach aktorskich
7. Informację o posiadanym i czynnym prawie jazdy lub jego braku

Nie zwracamy kosztów dojazdu/noclegu

items.text:
**AUDITION NOTICE 🎭**

Hello everyone!

I’m producing **Jesus Hopped The A Train**, and I’m currently seeking an actress, **early 30s to early 40s**, for the role of **Mary Jane Hanrahan**.

Mary Jane is a tough-as-nails public defender who becomes deeply invested in Angel Cruz’s case. She’s sharp, driven, and carries that courtroom fire with a whole lot of heart underneath the armor.

This is a paid position. 

The production will be staged at **Dramatic Hall Theater in Peekskill, New York**, running **July 10th through July 26th**.

Please send your **resume** and **video reel link**, if you have one, to:

**juan@tmjentertainment.com**

items.text:
CASTING CALL — PAID EDITORIAL PORTRAIT SHOOT

Los Angeles / Hollywood | May 16–19 (exact date TBD) | 4–6 Hours | $150

Seeking: Male talent, 40s–60s

This is a cinematic portrait shoot, not a commercial job. The images are being made as authored editorial work — the kind of photograph that lives on a wall or in a book, not an ad. You will receive full high-resolution images for your own portfolio, acting reel, or personal use.

We are looking for someone who can inhabit a character, not just stand in front of a camera. Presence matters more than looks. The right person has a face that carries history — heavy, weathered, specific. Think less model, more character actor. Early Sopranos energy. The kind of man who looks like he’s been somewhere and isn’t sure where he’s going next.

The shoot takes place at a Hollywood motel. The work is psychological and still — influenced by photographer Philip-Lorca diCorcia. Not fashion. Not commercial. Something quieter and more interior.

The primary setup: a man on the edge of a bed, business suit on, briefcase in hand or at his feet, staring into the corner of the room. That’s the image. Simple, loaded, cinematic. We’ll work through 2–3 variations within the same emotional world.

This role requires stillness and the ability to hold an internal emotional state without performing it. If you’ve ever been told your face does the work — this is that job.

Ideal if you own a dark business suit. Well-worn is better than sharp. Wardrobe can be supplied if needed — just include your measurements when you submit.

Rate: $150 for the session

Full image credit on all published work

High-res selects provided for your portfolio

To submit: send a recent photo (doesn’t need to be professional, just natural) and a brief note about yourself to info@leonardabraham.com

items.text:
Seeking Director of Photography – Vertical Project (LA)
We’re looking for a **Director of Photography (DP)** for an upcoming vertical shoot.

**Dates:** May 7–10
**Rate:** $350/day
**Camera:** Fuji X-M5
**Location:** Los Angeles

This project blends **stylized and traditional coverage** — think *Man on Fire* in terms of visual tone and energy.

We’re specifically looking for someone who can bring a **dynamic shooting style** and actively contribute to the storytelling. This is **not** a point-and-shoot gig — we want a DP who can come in with intention, elevate the material, and collaborate creatively.

If interested, please email **[Crew@filmaticblack.com](mailto:Crew@filmaticblack.com)** with:
* Your name
* Contact information
* Credits/reel
* Any relevant info

Let’s build something strong.

items.text:
Crew Call – Script Supervisor (CineVert™ Vertical Project – LA)
We’re looking for a Script Supervisor for an upcoming CineVert™.

A CineVert™ is a prestige-driven evolution of cinematic storytelling—crafted with the discipline and quality of traditional filmmaking, but designed specifically for mobile-first platforms like Instagram. This is not repurposed content—every phase is intentionally built for this medium with a strong cinematic approach.

Dates: May 8–10  

Rate: $250/day  

Location: Los Angeles  

Looking for someone detail-oriented who can track continuity, monitor performance and coverage, and support the director and editorial workflow.

⚡ We are looking to hire today.

If interested, please email Crew@filmaticblack.com with:  

- Your name  

- Contact information  

- Credits/resume  

- Any relevant info

Looking for someone detail-oriented who can track continuity, monitor performance and coverage, and support the director and editorial workflow.

⚡ We are looking to hire today.

If interested, please email Crew@filmaticblack.com with:  

- Your name  

- Contact information  

- Credits/resume  

- Any relevant info
items.title: Crew Call – Script Supervisor (CineVert™ Vertical Project – LA)

items.text:
**AUDITION NOTICE 🎭**

Hello everyone!

I’m producing **Jesus Hopped The A Train**, and I’m currently seeking an actress, **early 30s to early 40s**, for the role of **Mary Jane Hanrahan**.

Mary Jane is a tough-as-nails public defender who becomes deeply invested in Angel Cruz’s case. She’s sharp, driven, and carries that courtroom fire with a whole lot of heart underneath the armor.

This is a paid position. 

The production will be staged at **Dramatic Hall Theater in Peekskill, New York**, running **July 10th through July 26th**.

Please send your **resume** and **video reel link**, if you have one, to:

**juan@tmjentertainment.com**

items.text:
**🎬 CASTING CALL – FEATURE FILM 🎬**

Role: University Professor
Gender: Male
Age Range: 40–55
Ethnicity: Caucasian

We are casting for a brief but meaningful role in an upcoming feature film. The character is a university professor whose assistant is once again late for work, and he is clearly unimpressed. Although there is no dialogue, the role carries emotional depth and strong screen presence.

📍 Location: **Surrey City Library, Surrey, BC**
📅 Shoot Date: **May 24, 2026**
⏰ Time: **10:00 AM – 11:00 AM**

This is a volunteer/unpaid position. Crafty and screen credits will be provided.

We are looking for someone expressive, natural, and comfortable conveying emotion through performance without dialogue.

Please send headshots and any acting reels/experience if available to **expressentryfilm@gmail.com**

items.text:
✨ WARSZTATY MODELINGOWE W DĘBICY ✨
Marzysz o świecie mody, pokazach, profesjonalnych sesjach zdjęciowych lub chcesz spróbować swoich sił przed kamerą? 
Te warsztaty są dla Ciebie! zarówno dla kobiet, jak i mężczyzn 

📍 Dębica
📅 13.06.2026

To wyjątkowe wydarzenie stworzone dla osób, które chcą wejść do świata fashion, rozwinąć pewność siebie, nauczyć się pracy przed aparatem i poznać branżę od kulis 

W programie m.in.:
✔ nauka chodzenia po wybiegu i pozowania
✔ profesjonalna sesja zdjęciowa + polaroidy
✔ backstage świata mody
✔ pokaz makijażu beauty/backstage
✔ trening z trenerką personalną i stretching
✔ prelekcje beauty, pielęgnacja i stylizacja włosów
✔ budowanie portfolio i social media modela/modelki
✔ networking i możliwość dalszych współprac w branży fashion

✨ Jedna z osób biorących udział otrzyma wyjątkową nagrodę „Złoty Bilet”, czyli możliwość wyjazdu do Kapadocji i udziału w Fashion Weeku! ✈️

Nie musisz mieć doświadczenia liczy się chęć rozwoju, energia i otwartość na nowe możliwości 

📩 Liczba miejsc ograniczona
Zapisy i szczegóły w wiadomości prywatnej lub pod numerem:
📞 577 315 638

#warsztatymodelingowe #modeling #fashion #dębica #fashionweek #sesjazdjęciowa #model #modelka #wybieg #beauty #warsztaty #socialmedia #moda
